title: Avian influenza and Newcastle disease: audit of Thailand's disease control measures
body: "This report sets out the findings, conclusions and recommendations of an audit undertaken by Defra in Thailand from 19 November to 1 December 2023.  The audit assessed the animal health surveillance, prevention and control measures implemented by the Thai competent authorities in relation to highly pathogenic avian influenza (HPAI) and Newcastle disease (ND).  This page also includes the recommendations from the report and responses from the competent authority in Thailand and Great Britain.  "
